name: HELIUS MEDICAL TECHNOLOGIES
summary: HELIUS MEDICAL TECHNOLOGIES is a medical device company focused on neurological conditions, primarily developing the PoNS (Portable Neuromodulation Stimulator) device. The PoNS device is designed to deliver neurostimulation through the tongue to potentially improve balance and gait deficits in patients with neurological disorders. The company is headquartered in Newtown, Pennsylvania.
